automations.title: Set Up Automations
automations.description: Import ready-made blueprints into Home Assistant. Each blueprint creates an automation that you can customize with your own devices.
automations.go_signal: GO Signal — Switch on devices when energy is cheap
automations.avoid_signal: AVOID Signal — Switch off devices when energy is expensive
automations.price_alert: Price Alert — Get notified at cheap or expensive prices
automations.best_window: Best Window — Smart scheduling during cheapest hours
automations.help: Click a button to import the blueprint into Home Assistant. You can then configure which devices to control.

dashboard.degraded_no_tax: Limited price calculation — tax data not yet available. Price shown is wholesale excl. taxes.
dashboard.degraded_embedded: Using estimated tax data. Prices may differ slightly from your actual tariff.
dashboard.exact_tooltip: Exact price from your energy supplier
dashboard.calibrated_tooltip: Price calibrated with real supplier data (average across providers)
dashboard.estimated_tooltip: Estimated price — install a sensor integration for exact prices

actions.reason_stale: data not fresh enough for GO

tax.title: Price Breakdown
tax.network_info: Network costs (~{amount} ct/kWh) are billed separately by your grid operator.
tax.no_data: Tax breakdown not yet available for this zone.

settings.mode_auto_hint: Consumer prices calculated automatically using tax data from Synctacles servers.
settings.mode_manual_hint: Enter your own tax components to calculate the consumer price from wholesale.
settings.mode_external_sensor_hint: Use any HA sensor that provides your electricity tariff (Zonneplan, Tibber, Octopus, P1 meter, etc.).
settings.mode_fixed_hint: Enter your own flat rate. No dynamic pricing — useful for fixed-price contracts.
settings.fixed_rate_hint: The fixed consumer price from your contract. GO/WAIT/AVOID signals are disabled in fixed-rate mode.
settings.mode_tou_hint: Bi-horário / tri-horário: set peak and off-peak rates with a schedule. GO/WAIT/AVOID follows your schedule.
settings.tou_toggle_hint: Enable to use different rates for peak and off-peak hours instead of a flat rate.
settings.tou_no_periods: No periods defined yet. Add a period or select a preset.
settings.tou_hint: Hours not covered by any period use the off-peak rate. The app generates GO during off-peak and AVOID during peak hours.
settings.supplier_hint: Select your supplier to automatically set the correct markup.
settings.p1_sensor_hint: Select the HA sensor that provides your current electricity tariff.
settings.best_window_hint: Duration of the cheapest contiguous window (1-8 hours, default 3)
settings.power_sensor_info: A power sensor measures your real-time electricity consumption in watts (W). This is NOT a price/tariff sensor. It enables Live Cost, Savings, and Usage Score on the dashboard. Examples: sensor.power_consumption, sensor.p1_meter_active_power.
settings.power_sensor_hint: HA entity for live cost (auto-detected if empty)
settings.restart_wizard_hint: Re-run the initial setup to change your region or reconfigure your pricing plan.
settings.restarting_hint: The app is restarting. This page will reload automatically.
settings.save_error: Could not save settings. Please check your configuration and try again.
settings.delete_data_desc: Remove all your data from our servers.
settings.delete_data_body: This will permanently remove all your data from our servers and disable the app. Price fetching, recommendations, and all server features will stop working.
settings.delete_data_hint: By keeping your anonymous data, you help improve energy price accuracy for the entire Home Assistant community. Are you sure?
settings.delete_data_error: Failed to delete data. Please try again.

feedback.bug_desc_placeholder: Describe what happened and what you expected...
feedback.fill_both: Please fill in both title and description
feedback.submit_error: Could not submit feedback. Please check your connection and try again.
feedback.bug_submit_error: Could not submit bug report. Please check your connection and try again.

unsupported_region.title: Region Not Yet Supported
unsupported_region.body: Synctacles Energy currently supports EU and UK electricity zones. Your Home Assistant location ({timezone}) is outside the supported coverage area. The app requires day-ahead wholesale price data which is not yet available for your region.
unsupported_region.contact: Want support for your region? Let us know:

disclaimer.title: Important Notice
disclaimer.intro: This software is provided free of charge. Please read the following before using Synctacles Energy.
disclaimer.item_1: This software is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied.
disclaimer.item_2: Energy price data is provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee accuracy, completeness, or timeliness.
disclaimer.item_3: You are solely responsible for any financial decisions based on the information displayed by this app.
disclaimer.item_4: Synctacles is not liable for any damages arising from the use of this software or the data it provides.
disclaimer.item_5: Synctacles is not affiliated with or endorsed by Home Assistant, Nabu Casa, ENTSO-E, or any energy data provider.
disclaimer.item_6: By using this app you accept these terms. You may uninstall the app at any time.
disclaimer.footer: By clicking "I Understand" you acknowledge that you have read and accept these terms.

privacy_notice.title: Privacy first — by design.
privacy_notice.intro_1: SYNCTACLES does not store personal data.
privacy_notice.intro_2: No account, no email, no tracking.
privacy_notice.explanation: To keep this free product stable and improve it for everyone, your app sends anonymous technical data to our servers. This data is used exclusively for product improvement and cannot be traced back to you or your household.
privacy_notice.collect_1: Home Assistant version and system architecture
privacy_notice.collect_3: Anonymous installation identifier (random, not linked to you)
privacy_notice.never_1: Entity names, sensor values, or states
privacy_notice.never_4: IP addresses, location, or any personal information

wizard.title: Welcome to Synctacles Energy
wizard.subtitle: Let's set up your energy prices in a few steps.
wizard.region_why: Your location determines energy tariffs, taxes, and the timing of GO/WAIT/AVOID actions. Please verify your region is correct.
wizard.single_zone: Your country has one bidding zone.
wizard.multi_zone: Your country has multiple bidding zones. Select yours.
wizard.markup_hint: Your supplier's per-kWh markup on top of wholesale prices.
wizard.tariff_intro: How does your energy supplier bill you?
wizard.tariff_variable_desc: Spot prices from the energy market, adjusted with your supplier's markup and taxes.
wizard.tariff_fixed_desc: A flat rate per kWh, regardless of market prices.
wizard.tariff_tou_desc: Different rates for peak and off-peak hours.
wizard.no_wholesale_desc: This zone has regulated tariffs (no wholesale market). Choose a fixed or time-of-use tariff.
wizard.tax_adjusted: Custom tax values will be applied.
wizard.zone_mismatch: Your location appears to be in {detected}, but your Home Assistant is configured for {ha_country}. We have applied the detected zone. You can change this below if needed.
wizard.sensor_exact_msg: Your energy price comes directly from your supplier. Prices are exact.

cache.title: Price Cache
cache.subtitle: Full transparency into cached prices and their composition
cache.reset_confirm: Clear all cached prices and fetch fresh data?

costs.title: Energy Cost Breakdown
costs.subtitle: See how your electricity price is composed
costs.no_data: No price data available yet. Check back when prices are loaded.
costs.error: Could not load cost data. Tax profile may not be available for your zone.
costs.tax_share: of your energy price is taxes & levies
costs.network_info: Network costs (~{amount} ct/kWh) are billed separately by your grid operator and not included above.

info.price_exact: Price comes directly from your energy supplier. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions and price breakdown are 100% accurate.
info.price_calibrated: Price is calculated: ENTSO-E wholesale + average supplier markup from similar users. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions are >99% correct. Price breakdown may differ by up to ~1 ct/kWh. Install a price sensor (e.g. Zonneplan, Tibber) for exact prices.
info.price_estimated: Price is estimated based on ENTSO-E wholesale + standard taxes. GO/WAIT/AVOID actions are reliable (relative price differences are correct). Exact amounts may differ.
info.action_exact: Action based on exact supplier price. Accuracy: 100%.
info.action_calibrated: Action based on calibrated price (ENTSO-E + average supplier markup). Accuracy: 99.3% — in 287 of 8,760 hours per year the action may differ, but only when the price is close to the GO/WAIT threshold.
info.action_estimated: Action based on estimated price (ENTSO-E + standard taxes). Accuracy: ~98% — relative price differences between hours are reliable, but exact thresholds may differ.

purged.title: Data Deleted
purged.body: You have deleted your data from our servers. The app can no longer fetch prices or provide recommendations.
purged.hint: To restore full functionality, reinstall the app from the Home Assistant App Store.
